title: QuickCalc
body:
# QuickCalc

![preview](https://gitgud.io/deltanedas/quickcalc/-/raw/1.17/preview.png)

Clientside Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.16-1.18 that implements OpenModsLib's calculator feature.

To use it, simply send a chat message in the form `= <expression>`, e.g. `= 2 + 2`.

The answer will replace it, in that case `2 + 2 = 4`.
